texto: On some days, writing is wonderful. On the days when it is wonderful, it feels like you are the God of a universe that the rest of the world is not yet privy to. And then on some days, it is not wonderful; those days when nothing is coming and the cursor seems to be openly mocking you, blinking out ‘YOU SUCK AT WRITING AND YOU’RE UGLY AS BALLS’ in Morse code.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Leigh Whannell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “On some days, writing is wonderful. On the days when it is wonderful, it feels like you are the G…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, writing, writing-process pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de writing e writing-process.
